arts.ttl: Is England's most exciting generation still to emerge?
arts.sum: Littered with talent from some of Europe's biggest clubs, England's Under-21 squad now has an estimated worth of more than £500m - so is it their most exciting group yet?

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish: Newcastle transfer stance 'revealed' as 'new details' emerge over Man City exit
arts.sum: Manchester City attacker Jack Grealish is reportedly open to joining Newcastle United in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Zinedine Zidane Warned England Over 'Wasting' Top Talent - He Was Never Picked Again
arts.sum: Zidane warned England about 'wasting' top talent who was also a Liverpool icon but he was never picked again.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice jokingly reveals the teeth treatment which 'saved his life' - as the Arsenal star laughs at throwback video of himself
arts.sum: Rice, 26, revealed the personal titbit as he reminisced over his first international call-up with new England team-mates Dan Burn and Myles Lewis-Skelly.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel tears apart Gareth Southgate's England
arts.sum: Current England boss Thomas Tuchel delivered a nut-and-bolt dismantling of the nation's performance at Euro 2024 which was overseen by Sir Gareth Southgate.

arts.ttl: England predicted lineup vs Albania - World Cup qualifying
arts.sum: The starting XI Thomas Tuchel could name against Albania for his first match in charge of England.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer: Carragher SLAMMED over Chelsea contract comment
arts.sum: Although Palmer is currently on a ten-match run without a goal or assist, the 22-year-old has been Chelsea’s best player this year, prompting Carragher to question whether the England star would grow frustrated if the Blues missed out on Champions League football next season. "Agents aren't going to be encouraging Cole Palmer to sign long-term contracts with Chelsea, because agents are going to make their money by moving him somewhere else.

arts.ttl: Angel Gomes 'set to snub £100,000-a-week Premier League move' as England midfielder nears end of Lille contract
arts.sum: Gomes has made 134 appearances in all competitions for the Ligue 1 club, with his form leading to call-ups to the England squad under interim boss Lee Carlsey last year.

arts.ttl: Kane: I was surprised when Tuchel got England job
arts.sum: Harry Kane has admitted he was "surprised" when Thomas Tuchel was named England head coach but said the German brings more "energy and enthusiasm" to the role than predecessor Gareth Southgate.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane hopes to enjoy ‘amazing journey’ under new England boss Thomas Tuchel
arts.sum: Kane will captain his country on Friday in his former Bayern Munich boss’ first game in charge of England.
